lines.speaker: Awowogei
lines.text: You have brought peace between our kingdoms, [player name].

lines.speaker: Awowogei
lines.text: I've instructed my people to allow you full access to our Island, but beware I do not command the undead beneath us.

sections.title: Using a big banana on him

lines.speaker: Awowogei
lines.text: Now that's quite the banana. Where did you get it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Far from here, deep in the Kharidian Desert.

lines.speaker: Awowogei
lines.text: Well, that was a fascinating story. We have of course heard of various troops of our kind spread across the land, but this is the first I have heard of these ones.

lines.speaker: Awowogei
lines.text: Now that we know their story, you can rest assured that their memory will live on here.

lines.speaker: Awowogei
lines.text: Please enter the answer to the question.

lines.speaker: Awowogei
lines.text: How can that be? Go check again!

lines.speaker: Awowogei
lines.text: I need you to answer this for me.
